message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker state

Sync beads issues.jsonl with latest tracker updates from concurrent agent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -384,7 +384,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-ohmj","title":"[Epic] Win32 Platform Adapter","description":"Replace the empty src/platform/win32/hooks.c stub with a real Win32 platform adapter that populates asx_runtime_hooks for live-mode Windows targets.

## Background
Same hook architecture as POSIX adapter (see POSIX epic for details on asx_runtime_hooks struct). Win32 uses different OS APIs: QueryPerformanceCounter for timing, BCryptGenRandom for entropy, WSAPoll or IOCP for reactor, CreateThread for blocking pool.

## Scope
Wave B/C. Lower priority than POSIX since the primary development environment is Linux.

## Deliverables
1. Clock hooks: QueryPerformanceCounter/QueryPerformanceFrequency for monotonic ns
2. Entropy hook: BCryptGenRandom from bcrypt.h
3. Reactor hook: WSAPoll or CreateIoCompletionPort wrapper
4. Blocking pool worker: CreateThread + event object for completion signaling
5. Export function: asx_win32_hooks_install(asx_runtime_hooks *h)
6. Public header: include/asx/platform/win32.h
7. Cross-compilation tests: verify compilation with mingw-w64 (no runtime execution)
8. Makefile: build-win32 target with conditional linking (-lbcrypt, -lws2_32)

## Files
- src/platform/win32/hooks.c (modify: replace empty stub)
- include/asx/platform/win32.h (new: public declaration)
- Makefile (modify: add build-win32 target)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-04-03T13:56:44.188126528Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-05T23:54:45.434434875Z","closed_at":"2026-04-05T23:54:45.434164183Z","close_reason":"All Win32 adapter deliverables complete: clock (QPC), entropy (BCryptGenRandom), reactor (WSAPoll/SleepEx), blocking pool (CreateThread), log (stderr+OutputDebugString), install function, public header, Makefile build-win32 target. Cross-compilation requires mingw-w64 in CI.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-opvq","title":"Win32: Implement entropy hook (BCryptGenRandom)","description":"Implement Win32 entropy hook using BCryptGenRandom from bcrypt.h (Vista+). Generate 8 bytes, memcpy to uint64_t. Link -lbcrypt.
